name: crazy-faith
description: Michael Todd's 'Crazy Faith: It's Only Crazy Until It Happens' — a high-energy guide to faith that looks irrational to the world but is exactly what God calls you to, covering baby faith, waiting faith, and everything in between.
useCase: Take bold leaps of faith, grow through different stages of spiritual maturity, and trust God even when it doesn't make sense to anyone else.
knownRisks: Christian-focused content — primarily relevant to Christian readers
Strong charismatic/Pentecostal orientation — may not resonate across all denominations
